html:
2026-0406
2026-04-30GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityCanada - French Republic on the Exchange and Mutual Protection of Classified Information ** Agreement ** Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the French Republic on the Exchange and Mutual Protection of Classified Information.N/A
subject: Canada - French Republic on the Exchange and Mutual Protection of Classified Information ** Agreement **
precis: Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the French Republic on the Exchange and Mutual Protection of Classified Information.
